question.label: Design/API mismatch
question.name: When design and API details do not match, where does it usually break first?
question.description: Drills into the specific mismatch he named so the manager can locate the unclear handoff.

answer: I am not always sure who should approve what before I push.

assessment.note: He names a specific approval-path uncertainty before pushing, which is a mild negative clarity signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'who should approve what before I push' not followed because drill cap requires advancing the arc.

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
